node.title: huaweicloud_modelartsv2_workflow
node.description: Manages a ModelArts workflow resource within HuaweiCloud.

examples.title: Create a workflow with steps and storages

arguments.name: region
arguments.description: Specifies the region where the workflow is located. If omitted, the provider-level region will be used. Changing this creates a new resource.

details.text: Specifies the region where the workflow is located. If omitted, the provider-level region will be used. Changing this creates a new resource.

children.text: If omitted, the provider-level region will be used. Changing this creates a new resource.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Specifies the name of the workflow. The name consists of `1` to `64` characters, including Chinese and English letters, digits, spaces, underscores (_), and hyphens (-), and must start with a Chinese or English letter.

details.text: Specifies the name of the workflow. The name consists of `1` to `64` characters, including Chinese and English letters, digits, spaces, underscores (_), and hyphens (-), and must start with a Chinese or English letter.

children.name: type
children.description: Specifies the type of the workflow step.

details.text: Specifies the type of the workflow step.

children.text: + **job**: The job type of the workflow step.
+ **labeling**: The labeling type of the workflow step.
+ **release_dataset**: The release dataset type of the workflow step.
+ **model**: The model type of the workflow step.
+ **service**: The service type of the workflow step.
+ **mrs_job**: The MRS job type of the workflow step.
+ **dataset_import**: The dataset import type of the workflow step.
+ **create_dataset**: The create dataset type of the workflow step.
